dataformat.name: hl7
dataformat.title: HL7
dataformat.description: Marshal and unmarshal HL7 (Health Care) model objects using the HL7 MLLP codec.
dataformat.label: dataformat,transformation,health

parser.label: advanced
parser.description: To use a custom HL7 parser

validate.description: Whether to validate the HL7 message Is by default true.

targetFormat.description: The target format for marshal output and unmarshal result type. By default, marshal encodes to HL7 ER7, and unmarshal returns a HAPI Message object. If this is set to XML, marshal encodes to HL7 XML, and unmarshal returns an XML DOM Document.
